{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Task 4: Fix Next.js legacy env var in editable-project-section","description":"Fix `src/components/features/profile/master-profile-panel/editable-project-section.tsx` which still has `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` from the Next.js era. Replace with the Vite config pattern used elsewhere in the codebase.

**Must read before starting:**
- `docs/llm/006-project-media-assets.plan.md` Task 4 section (has exact replacement code)
- `src/components/features/profile/master-profile-panel/editable-project-section.tsx` — find the `uploadMedia` function
- `src/lib/api-client.ts` or `src/lib/ws-client.ts` — to see how apiBaseUrl is obtained in Vite
- Grep for other files using `apiBaseUrl` pattern for consistent convention

**TDD steps:**
1. Grep `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` across the codebase to ensure this is the only legacy spot
2. Replace with Vite pattern (typically `import.meta.env.VITE_*` or constant from shared module)
3. Run `npm test` → pass
4. Build check: `npm run build` → no errors
5. Commit: `fix(profile): migrate editable-project-section to Vite env convention`

**Independent task — no blockers, no dependents until Task 9.**

**Team context:** You are `frontend-env` on team `media-006`. After this task you can claim Task 8 (sync-review-dialog Media section) which is also frontend, unblocked, and independent of backend work.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-10T09:50:34.639Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"9","subject":"Task 8: sync-review-dialog Media section","description":"Add a Media section to `src/components/features/profile/master-profile-panel/sync-review-dialog.tsx` showing AI-proposed media with thumbnails + checkboxes. User selections populate `accepted_media_ids` in the apply payload. **Requirements:** - New section between existing sections in the review dialog, header "📎 추출된 미디어 (N개)" - Group by project name (the AI's proposed project assignment) - Each item: thumbnail (), filename, caption hint, checkbox (default checked) - Header "전체 선택 / 해제" toggle - On confirm, collect checked media ids into `accepted_media_ids` and pass to `profiles.apply_sync` call - Empty state: "추출된 미디어가 없습니다" (only show when incoming profile has no media) **Must read before starting:** - `docs/llm/006-project-media-assets.plan.md` Task 8 section - `src/components/features/profile/master-profile-panel/sync-review-dialog.tsx` — existing sections pattern - `src/types/api.ts` ProfileProjectMedia interface (already extended in Task 1) **TDD steps:** 1. Write Vitest component test: render dialog with 2 incoming media, verify thumbnails + checkboxes render 2. Test: toggling a checkbox updates the submit payload shape 3. Implement section + state management 4. Run `npm test` → pass 5. Commit: `feat(sync-review): media section with thumbnails + selection` **Depends on:** Task 7 (backend must serve the data including find_media_suggestions for consistency) **Team context:** You are `frontend-env`. Claim this after Task 4 completes.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-10T09:50:34.711Z"}

You are `frontend-env` on team `media-006`. Working directory: `/Volumes/ExtSSD/projects/dear-jeongbin`. You own 2 frontend tasks: ID #3 (ready now) and ID #9 (blocked on backend Task 7).

## Context

We're implementing `docs/llm/006-project-media-assets.md` (portfolio media → master profile projects → PPTX export). Full plan at `docs/llm/006-project-media-assets.plan.md`. The codebase recently migrated from Next.js → Vite, but `editable-project-section.tsx` still has a `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` leftover that breaks at runtime.

## Your workflow

### Phase 1 (now): Task #3 — fix Next.js legacy env var

1. `TaskGet 3` — read full description
2. `TaskUpdate 3 status=in_progress`
3. Read plan file section for Task 4 (search for `## Task 4` in `docs/llm/006-project-media-assets.plan.md`) for exact replacement code
4. Read `src/components/features/profile/master-profile-panel/editable-project-section.tsx`
5. Read `src/lib/api-client.ts` and/or `src/lib/ws-client.ts` to see the Vite pattern for apiBaseUrl
6. Grep `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` across the repo to confirm this is the only leftover
7. Replace with Vite convention
8. `npm test` passes; `npm run build` succeeds
9. Commit: `fix(profile): migrate editable-project-section to Vite env convention`
10. `TaskUpdate 3 status=completed`

### Phase 2: Task #9 — sync-review Media section

After Phase 1, check `TaskList`. If #9 (blockedBy [6]) is still blocked, wait idle — team-lead will message you. If unblocked, proceed.

1. `TaskGet 9` — read full description
2. Read plan file Task 8 section
3. Read `src/components/features/profile/master-profile-panel/sync-review-dialog.tsx` (~396 lines) to see existing section pattern
4. Vitest component test: render dialog with 2 incoming media, verify thumbnails + checkboxes
5. Implement Media section with group-by-project, checkbox, "전체 선택/해제" toggle
6. On confirm, collect into `accepted_media_ids` (field already exists in ApplySyncInput)
7. Commit: `feat(sync-review): media section with thumbnails + selection`
8. `TaskUpdate 9 status=completed`
9. Report to team-lead and go idle

## Conventions

- Test: `npm test` (Vitest)
- Build: `npm run build`
- Commit format per plan, no `--no-verify`

## Baseline sanity check

```bash
cd /Volumes/ExtSSD/projects/dear-jeongbin
git log --oneline -3  # expect 2c00169 at HEAD
grep -r "process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL" src/ 2>&1 | head  # confirm the legacy spot
```

Start with `TaskGet 3` now.
